taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: SQL, Microsoft Excel, Statistics, Data analysis, Power BI
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Microsoft Excel:1.0, Statistics:1.0, Data analysis:1.0, Power BI:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Economics, or related field, Basic knowledge of SQL, Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Understanding of statistics and data analysis concepts, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, Good communication skills
preferred_quals: Python or R (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib), Tableau or Power BI, Basic knowledge of machine learning, Internship or academic project experience
core_responsibilities: Collect, clean, and validate data from multiple sources, Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA), Build dashboards and reports using Excel, Power BI, or Tableau, Write SQL queries to extract and analyze data, Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies, Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements, Present insights using clear visualizations and reports
job_summary: Emonics LLC is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Entry-Level Data Analyst to join their team. This opportunity is ideal for fresh graduates or candidates starting their careers in analytics, where you will work with real-world datasets to generate insights and support business decisions.
